metadata.note: SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA — Not verified. Approximate zone boundaries for illustration only.
metadata.source: Illustrative data based on publicly known flood/risk areas in Bengaluru

properties.name: Bellandur Flood Risk Zone
properties.description: Historically flood-prone area around Bellandur lake. Stormwater drain overflow risk during monsoon.

properties.name: Hebbal Drainage Stress Zone
properties.description: Stormwater drainage stress around Hebbal lake and elevated flyover approaches.

properties.name: Majestic / City Railway Flood Pocket
properties.description: Low-lying area near KSR station prone to waterlogging. Impacts road access and utility corridors.

properties.name: Electronic City Low-Lying Flood Zone
properties.description: Pockets in Electronic City Phase 1 and 2 susceptible to stormwater accumulation.

properties.name: Peenya Industrial Water Stress Zone
properties.description: Industrial area with high water demand and borewell dependency. Tanker supply risk during dry months.

properties.name: Whitefield Road Access Risk Corridor
properties.description: ORR and Whitefield main roads face chronic congestion. Emergency vehicle access impaired during peak hours.

properties.name: KR Puram Flood-Road Risk Zone
properties.description: KR Puram bridge area and adjoining roads face flooding risk. Industrial effluent compounds drainage stress.

properties.name: Central Bengaluru Heat Island Zone
properties.description: Dense built-up area with limited green cover. Urban heat island effect impacts facility operations and staff.
